case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. EMILIO A MORAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, EMILIO A DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-17-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, EMILIO A $3,075.51 PRINCIPAL, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $344.63 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,286.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-04-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AMENDED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, EMILIO A
